name: PDF: Render from HTML

description.en: Convert HTML content to a PDF document using DomPDF. The generated PDF is stored in the team media library for sharing and download.
description.de: Wandle HTML-Inhalt mit DomPDF in ein PDF-Dokument um. Das erstellte PDF wird in der Team-Mediathek gespeichert und kann geteilt und heruntergeladen werden.

bot: Use this when the user needs a PDF generated from HTML. Prepare clean, styled HTML and pass it as input. The PDF is automatically stored in team media.

inputs.name: HTML Content

description.en: HTML content to convert to PDF

inputs.bot: Full HTML document including head and body. Include inline CSS for styling.

inputs.name: Label

description.en: Display label for the media item

inputs.bot: Human-readable label shown in the media library.

success.en: PDF rendered and saved to media library.
success.de: PDF erstellt und in der Mediathek gespeichert.
